SHORT NAME: MFP_RINSTLZD_RSN_CD 

LONG NAME: MFP_RINSTLZD_RSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): Money Follows the Person 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 00 = Default- No MFP Participation 
01 = Acute care hospitalization followed by long-term rehabilitation 
02 = Deterioration in cognitive functioning 
03 = Deterioration in health 
04 = Deterioration in mental health 
05 = Loss of housing 
06 = Loss of personal care
